[{"key":"0.215036273650210246","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/orc/role_picture1/3a057528-51ce-46ea-b693-84f2230ab4ae.png"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/orc/role_picture2/f593b906-c82e-4329-9446-84e027d435f4.png"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.d84227b4d30628","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"阿灰"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者阿灰，身份编码E01-013002，Re-A芯片状态正常，犯罪记录过于丰富。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原质能量稀薄缺少可开发性，不过他的小聪明很好的弥礼7这点，让他在E-01街头生活得如鱼得水。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"阿灰看人的眼神充满了算计，就好像对方不是个人而是个精美的钱袋子，出于这样的认知，干出敲诈勒索抢，劫之类的事就不令人意外了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"也是治安管理局的常客，违法记录长得能出本书，遭到多次修理却始终没有悔改，只能说这家伙对他的事业爱得深沉啊。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"R"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原质属性"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"虚"},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_56/h_56/50364/157597/20 i2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/530081.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/364402.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/357114.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【在E-07，没人比我更讲义气！】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「在道上混的，讲究的就是个义字。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这是一个被解散的团体里某当家大佬说的，小混混们深表认同。阿灰不以为然，如果靠义气就能做好一个帮派，这家伙的社团怎么就没了呢？"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"小混混们听到这里很难不同意，阿灰拿出自己的全部家底分发给众人，欺骗大家说自己有特别的赚钱方法，只要跟着他干，每天晚上都能收获这么多。吃香的喝辣的只是小意思，他们甚至可以把人类踩在脚底下！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"混混们沸腾了，生活待遇这玩意儿哪个帮派都大差不差，可跟着阿灰他们能获得尊严啊。于是混混们纷纷投诚以示衷心，阿灰对此非常满意。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"当然，他不会告诉别人，那位大佬的社团是自己向E.O.S.举报后才被端掉的。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【想当年，我还是个毛头小子】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"阿灰是和朋友一起从福利院里逃出来的，值得庆幸的是院长并没有多花心思去寻找他们，反正没有合法身份的两个人早晚会被抓走销毁，自己还能省下一大笔钱。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"阿灰与阿泽自由了没几天也意识到了这点，没有职业身份在伊瑟简直寸步难行，什么都买不起也没有地方住，每天都得饿着肚子去跟街上的流浪狗抢食物吃。这样的生活比起福利院来说好不了多少，渐渐的两人干起偷鸡摸狗的勾当，阿灰负责行动，阿泽为他放风，可以小孩子的能耐来说，没被抓住纯属走运。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"果不其然，在盗取一个大人物的贵重物品时，阿灰被逮捕了，原本他可以跑掉的，但为了掩护阿灰逃脱暴露了自己的位置。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那之后阿灰再也没有见过这位好友，根据伊瑟的法律，阿泽肯定是被送进监狱了，不会有例外。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"阿灰后来加入帮派给自己找了靠山，随后慢慢独立出来建立了自己的社团，夜深人静的时候阿灰总会想起儿时的玩伴。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他已经过上了小时候两人幻想的生活，可阿泽却没机会了。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【干这行，需要的是技巧！】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「这辈子没见过这么难缠的小混混！」某治安局长在被记者采访时声泪俱下的吐露心声。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"阿灰总能卡着最低的惩罚界线做上不合法的买卖，每当治安部员顺着犯罪气息赶到后，查封的却都是些过期保健品之类的玩意儿。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「连最专业的检测医生都查不出里面有违禁的成分！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我们被耍了，那个线人说的肯定是谎话！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"失控的异格者越来越多，每天都有无数乱子新增，而阿灰的势力渗透了地下交易网络的各个节点，他怎么可能什么都没做呢？"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"有人给部长出主意，要他给阿灰下套，却被老头言辞拒绝了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「执法者绝不能跟违法者堕落到同一道德水平线上，这是对法律的亵渎。」于是，由于部长的坚持，阿灰只好继续逍遥下去了。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.1049e8819bc1f","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"减益，控制"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 455|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性3效果命中 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色拥有不错的持续伤害和控制效果，能打源器多琪本。源网，支线，虚烬探索配合毒队也有不错的效果"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.40c2363e9c1fe","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12疾驰+8奋进+6讯光天击"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.01e16842bb3ed","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"万魔法典"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.607ed15092015","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_283/h_300/50364/842288/2025/7/18/622705.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"nobvaC2FUawP5KEa","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
